title: WAMUL Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
org: West Assam Milk Producers' Co-operative Union (WAMUL)
shortInfo: West Assam Milk Producers' Co-operative Union (WAMUL) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 1 Assistant – Warehouse & Logistics Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply Online through the official WAMUL website. The last date to submit the application form is 11-06-2026.

basic_details.organization_name: West Assam Milk Producers' Co-operative Union (WAMUL)
basic_details.short_information: West Assam Milk Producers' Co-operative Union (WAMUL) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 1 Assistant – Warehouse & Logistics Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply Online through the official WAMUL website. The last date to submit the application form is 11-06-2026.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: Not above 28 years as on 1st January, 2026.
age_limit.details: The maximum age limit is 28 years as on 1st January, 2026. Age relaxation may be given in case of appropriate or outstanding candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: Full time Graduation from a recognized Institute/University.
qualification.details: Assistant – Warehouse & Logistics: Full time Graduation from a recognized Institute/University. Minimum 2 years of full time working experience in Warehousing / Logistics.

salary_details.details: CTC Rs. 4.55 lakhs per annum including P.F & other Contributions. (Negotiable and commensurate with qualification and experience)

selection_process: Document Verification Written Test Personal Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the WAMUL Assistant – Warehouse & Logistics Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 11-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of WAMUL to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the WAMUL Assistant – Warehouse & Logistics recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the WAMUL Assistant – Warehouse & Logistics position is 11th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have completed a full-time Graduation from a recognized Institute or University to be eligible for this position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Assistant – Warehouse & Logistics role?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit is 28 years as of 1st January 2026. However, relaxation may be provided for deserving candidates.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Assistant – Warehouse & Logistics position?
faq.answer: The offered salary is a CTC of Rs. 4.55 lakhs per annum, which includes PF and other contributions. This is negotiable based on qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Assistant – Warehouse & Logistics post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Assistant – Warehouse & Logistics position in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications for the WAMUL Assistant – Warehouse & Logistics recruitment must be submitted online through the official WAMUL recruitment portal.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Assistant – Warehouse & Logistics position is on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q8. What is the required experience for the Assistant – Warehouse & Logistics role?
faq.answer: A minimum of 2 years of full-time working experience in Warehousing or Logistics is required for this role.

faq.question: Q9. What are the selection stages for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process includes Document Verification, a Written Test, and a Personal Interview.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: You can find the official notification PDF and the online application link in the 'Important Links' section of this article.
